title: 机械精度设计与检测
description: 《机械精度设计与检测》课程是高职装备制造类专业基础课程。本课程是“十四五”江苏省职业教育首批在线精品课程，解决机械零件设计中重要组成部分—精度设计问题，解决机械制造过程中精度检测的问题。The course " Mechanical Accuracy Design And Testing " is a basic course for higher vocational equipment manufacturing majors. This course is one of the first batch of online high-quality courses in Jiangsu Province's vocational education during the "14th Five-Year Plan" period. It addresses the important component in mechanical part design - accuracy design issues, as well as the problems of accuracy testing in the mechanical manufacturing process.
